title: Work Experience Reflection (RA)
description: Reflect on working relationships, conflict resolution, regulations, and reporting procedures.

questions.prompt: Describe the organisational procedures to deal with and report any problems that can affect working relationships.
Describe the difficulties that can occur in working relationships and how you can resolve them.
Describe the sorts of attitudes and requests that are likely to create conflict or negative responses.
Describe how The Working Time Regulations affect how you should be treated at work.
Describe how The Equality Act affects how you should be treated at work.
Describe the importance of making a contribution to improving working practices and procedures.
Explain when you should act on your own initiative and when you should ask for help from others.
In the workplace generally, who would you need to report to in the event of a problem?
